name: Azeroth
comment: A .azeroth file is a TypeScript module whose markup is JSX-shaped. Reusing VS Code's bundled TypeScript+JSX grammar (source.tsx) gives accurate base highlighting for the whole file; the language server's semantic tokens then refine component vs. host tags and event attributes on top.

azeroth-builtins.comment: Mark the framework's auto-imported control-flow components so they read as support types even before semantic tokens arrive.
azeroth-builtins.name: support.class.component.azeroth
